title: SQL-002: Strip SQLite migration path from migrate.ts
consumer_purpose: Remove all vestiges of SQLite database support from the migration CLI entry point, since the app has fully migrated to PostgreSQL (PGlite for dev, PG for production).
claim_atoms: path 2. Dialect type removed 3. MigrateOptions stripped to only connectionString + ssl 4. runMigrations accepts optional connectionString string
no dialect/dbPath 5. resolveConnectionString defaults to :memory: 6. CLI only accepts --connection-string
db:migrate:pg updated 8. test file updated: SQLite tests removed
PG tests simplified 9. bun typecheck passes
content:
## Files to modify

### 1. `packages/opencode/src/storage/migrate.ts` — REWRITE
- Strip SQLite imports: BunDatabase, drizzle(bun-sqlite), sqliteMigrate, Global, path, MIGRATIONS_SQLITE
- Keep only: init as initPg, applyMigrations from #db
- Remove Dialect type entirely
- Simplify MigrateOptions: only connectionString?: string, ssl?: boolean
- Remove detectDialect(), resolveDbPath()
- Simplify runMigrations() to only handle PG with default :memory:
- Simplify CLI to only accept --connection-string

### 2. `packages/opencode/test/storage/migrate.test.ts` — REWRITE
- Remove all SQLite-specific tests (4 tests gone)
- Remove dialect override tests (3 tests gone)
- Remove CLI --pg flag test (1 test gone)
- Simplify remaining PG tests using new runMigrations(connectionString?) signature
- Keep: in-memory PG test, env var auto-detect test, default to :memory: test

### 3. `packages/opencode/package.json` — UPDATE scripts
- Add: "db:migrate": "bun run src/storage/migrate.ts"
- Update: "db:migrate:pg": "bun run src/storage/migrate.ts" (remove --pg flag)
